gates.name: memory
gates.description: Heap and RSS — must not grow unboundedly over the soak window.

gates.name: requests
gates.description: process.active_requests — should stay near 0; reported only.

gates.name: ws
gates.description: sessions.ws_connections — reported; caller supplies expected count.

gates.name: fs_watch
gates.description: sessions.fs_watch_sessions — must return to 0 by end-of-run.

gates.name: disk.save_failure_count
gates.description: Cumulative SessionStore save failures — catches concurrent-save race + future fan-out bugs (DISK-04b).

gates.name: disk.bytes_used
gates.description: Total ~/.ai-or-die/ bytes — slope must stay bounded under steady load (DISK-02).
gates.summary: disk.usage_mb not exposed or insufficient samples (pre-DISK-02 bundle)

gates.name: disk.circuit_breaker
gates.description: ENOSPC circuit breaker — must stay closed under normal soak load (DISK-03).
gates.summary: disk_breaker tripped 0/123 samples (allowed by disk-bloat-quota workload)

gates.name: disk.quota
gates.description: Quota usage % — must stay below 90% under normal soak load (DISK-03).

gates.name: client.plan_detector
gates.description: plan-detector buffer must stay under 8 MB hard cap (CLIENT-01).

gates.name: client.dom
gates.description: DOM total_nodes slope must stay < 100 nodes/h (CLIENT-02).

gates.name: client.xterm
gates.description: xterm scrollback line count must stay ≤ 10100 (CLIENT-03 §1).

gates.name: client.ws
gates.description: WebSocket state must stay OPEN (1) post-baseline (CLIENT-03 §3 reconnect-failure detection).

gates.name: client.sse
gates.description: SSE stream count slope must stay ≤ 0 in steady state (CLIENT-03 §3).
